item.title: KOČÁREK JOSEF
item.description: Address: POD STROJÍRNAMI 706/5, PRAGUE 9 BORN 10.7.1911 ARRESTED IN 1942 FOR RESISTANCE ACTIVITIES EXECUTED IN PRAGUE AT THE KOBYLISKÁ SHOOTING RANGE ON 29 JUNE 1942 (Location: Prague, Czech Republic)

item.title: BERNSTEIN GISELA ROZ. KOLISCH
item.description: Address: VALČÍKOVA 1151/18, PRAGUE 8 BORN 1888 DEPORTED 1941 TO GRINI (NORWAY) 1942 TO AUSCHWITZ MORDERED 1.12.1942 More informations (Location: Prague, Czech Republic)

item.title: BERNSTEIN RICHARD
item.description: Address: VALČÍKOVA 1151/18, PRAGUE 8 BORN 12.09.1882 DEPORTED 1942 TO GRINI (NORWAY) 1942 TO AUSCHWITZ MORDERED 21.1.1943 More informations Prisoner details – Bernstein Richard – Auschwitz (Location: Prague, Czech Republic)
